response.justification: Bogdan is a Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior position—a severe seniority mismatch that would likely result in disengagement and rapid departure. While his software engineering fundamentals are strong and he has Java experience, his recent work is heavily weighted toward TypeScript/Node.js, and critically, his German language skills are only basic despite the role requiring strong German proficiency for an insurance sector client-facing position in Germany.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience with proven mastery of OOP principles, design patterns, and software architecture across multiple languages
Based in Berlin with fluent English and demonstrated ability to work effectively in agile team environments and collaborative projects
Has Java experience from previous roles at Altom Consulting for robotic systems and infrastructure tooling
concerns: Vastly overqualified for entry-level junior role; senior-level professional will likely find position unchallenging and leave quickly
German language skills are basic when role explicitly requires strong verbal and written German for client collaboration in insurance sector
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js; Java is not a current focus area, representing a step backward from recent senior full-stack role
